name: weekendmode
description: Presence detection extension that reports developer activity status

weekendmode.idleAfterSeconds.description: Seconds of inactivity before status becomes idle.

weekendmode.awayAfterSeconds.description: Seconds of inactivity before status becomes away.

weekendmode.heartbeatActiveSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to send heartbeats while active.

weekendmode.heartbeatIdleSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to send heartbeats while idle.

weekendmode.claudeCode.enabled.description: Enable Claude Code activity tracking (watches JSONL transcript files).

weekendmode.claudeCode.transcriptPath.description: Override path to Claude Code transcript directory. Leave empty for auto-detection.

scripts.package: npm run version:bump && npm run check-types && node esbuild.js --production
